# llms.txt file for Taiwan Digital Fest 2026
# This file helps AI language models understand and index our website structure

# Site Information
Site: Taiwan Digital Fest 2026 (2026 台灣數位嘉年華)
Base URL: https://fest.dna.org.tw
Organization: Taiwan Digital Nomad Association (TDNA)
Language: English, Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
Event Period: May 1-31, 2026
Locations: Taitung & Hualien, Taiwan

# Key Pages & Content
Main Page: /
About: About Taiwan Digital Fest 2026 - A curated festival for digital nomads in Taiwan
Event Highlights: Opening Party, Digital Nomad Activities, 5-Star Nomad Buffet, VIP Lunch/Dinner, 3-Day 2-Night Hualien Trip, VVIP Experiences
Tickets: Explorer, Contributor, Backer
Accommodation: Certified Taiwan Digital Nomad Friendly accommodations in Taitung and Hualien

# Core Information
What: Taiwan Digital Fest 2026 is a month-long curated festival for digital nomads combining professional development (AI workshops, networking, startup pitches) with natural experiences (biking, ocean tours, hot springs, cultural activities) in Taitung and Hualien, Taiwan.

When: May 1-31, 2026

Where: Taitung and Hualien, Taiwan - Two of Taiwan's most scenic regions known for stunning coastlines, mountains, and rich indigenous culture.

Who: Digital nomads, remote workers, creators, entrepreneurs, and anyone interested in work-life balance in Taiwan's most beautiful natural settings.

# Ticket Types
Explorer: Basic access - Exclusive community, Opening Party, 10+ Digital Nomad Activities
Contributor: Includes Explorer benefits + Five-Star Nomad Buffet, 4 VIP Dinners, 15+ activities
Backer: Full access - All Contributor benefits + 4 VIP Lunches, 4 VVIP Experiences, 3-Day 2-Night Hualien Trip, 20+ activities

# Key Activities
- Opening Party: Networking event to kick off the festival
- Digital Nomad Activities: Workshops, talks, and networking in bookstores, cafes, bars, and co-working spaces
- 5-Star Nomad Buffet: Premium dining experience in Hualien
- VIP Lunch/Dinner: Curated local culinary experiences in Taitung
- 3-Day 2-Night Hualien Trip: Immersive journey through local tribes, river tracing, and nature
- VVIP Experiences: Exclusive slow-living itineraries including SPA coffee moon-viewing, hot springs, and Chishang day trips

# Why Taiwan for Digital Nomads
- Safe, convenient, and friendly environment
- Excellent internet infrastructure
- Affordable living costs
- Rich culture and stunning natural landscapes
- Perfect balance of work opportunities and relaxation in Taitung and Hualien

# Accommodation
Not included in ticket price, but certified Taiwan Digital Nomad Friendly accommodations available in both Taitung and Hualien with booking information on website.

# Registration
Available through website registration links. Visa requirements depend on nationality - most visitors can enter Taiwan visa-free for 14-90 days.

# Languages
Primary: English
Secondary: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
Most activities conducted in English with Chinese translations available.

# Social Media & Contact
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/taiwandigitalfest
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/taiwandigitalfest
Email: fest@dna.org.tw

# Key Entities
- Taiwan Digital Nomad Association (TDNA): Organizer
- Taiwan Digital Fest 2026: Event name
- Taitung: Event location - known for mountains, ocean, and culture
- Hualien: Event location - known for gorges, communities, and nature
- Digital Nomad: Target audience - remote workers seeking work-life balance
